response.justification: Bogdan has strong generalist software engineering experience with leadership roles and some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq. However, his resume lacks direct experience in fintech infrastructure (credit systems, payment flows, real-time risk modeling) or building production-grade multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments. His background in event-driven systems and distributed architectures is relevant but not specialized enough for the CTO role.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems expertise with event-driven architectures (GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Leadership in scaling engineering teams and adopting disciplined practices (RIDE Capital, Altom Consulting)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent tooling (MCP, developer frameworks at re:cinq)
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with fintech infrastructure (credit risk, liquidity management) or regulatory compliance
Limited direct experience with agentic AI systems in high-stakes commercial environments
Scant evidence of hiring/executing at scale (10-30+ engineers) or managing outsourced engineering partnerships
